name: HR_DOCUMENTS_OF_RECORD_
description: This table contains information about the audited data for document records.

columns.Name: DOCUMENTS_OF_RECORD_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key. Uniquely identifies a document of record.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_CODE
columns.Comments: Document Code uniquely identifies record .

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person against whom document has to be stored.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment against whom document has to be stored.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the type of document which is stored. It also determines the document category and subcategory it will be related to.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the document of record. Used in order to differentiate incase multiple documents are added to the same document type.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Number which legally identifies the particular document.

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Date from which the document is valid.

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: Date until which the document is valid.

columns.Name: ISSUING_COUNTRY
columns.Comments: Country which has issued the document.

columns.Name: ISSUING_LOCATION
columns.Comments: Location at which document has been issued.

columns.Name: ISSUED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which document has been issued.

columns.Name: ISSUING_AUTHORITY
columns.Comments: Designation of person or authority name who has issued the document.

columns.Name: VERIFIED_BY
columns.Comments: Obsoleted - not in use.

columns.Name: VERIFIED_DATE
columns.Comments: Obsoleted - not in use.

columns.Name: RELATED_OBJECT_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the entity whose document is being stored for example Absences.

columns.Name: RELATED_OBJECT_ID_COL
columns.Comments: Attribute name of the entity whose document is being stored e.g. Absence_Id.

columns.Name: RELATED_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Actual value of the attribute. E.g. 100001, actual value of Absence_Id.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comments pertaining to the Document Record.

columns.Name: PUBLISH
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the document should be published before the start date

columns.Name: PUBLISH_DATE
columns.Comments: Publish date will decide when document should be visible.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: obsoleted - not in use.

columns.Name: CREATION_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Indicates the source of the record creation ie HDL/HSDL/UI/REST etc.

columns.Name: TAG_LIST
columns.Comments: Tags used to identify document record for classification and grouping

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
